summary: PIN lock screen; entering the correct PIN 11111 unlocks it. Taps key 1 five times, then ASSERTS the unlock outcome (mobile-input-status reads "unlocked").
Tinder-style swipeable card deck driven by three bottom buttons; tap like (heart) then dislike (close) to fly two cards off, then ASSERT the deck advanced (swipe-cards-status reads "swiped:2").
Full-screen Skia logarithmic spiral; a full-screen invisible pressable re-randomizes the spiral angle on each tap. Tap twice, then ASSERT the tap counter (spiral-status reads "spiral-taps:2").

Vertical sectioned content list with a scroll-driven progress indicator; scroll DOWN through sections then back UP, then ASSERT the scroll drove the progress (scroll-progress-status latches to "scrolled").
Grid/list layout toggle; a floating FAB morphs the layout. Tap the FAB twice, then ASSERT the toggle count (animated-grid-list-status reads "grid:2").
Floating bottom tab bar (icon tabs); tap the rightmost (settings) then second (bookmark) tab, then ASSERT the active tab (floating-bottom-bar-status reads "tab:bookmark").
Two cards with a clip-path reveal on press; press 'Explore Demos' then 'Learn More', then ASSERT both reveals fired (animated-clip-box-status reads "revealed:2").

Skia theme switcher: six selectable color squares around the center; swiping across the canvas sweeps over squares and flood-fills the background. Swipe LEFT then DOWN, then ASSERT the theme changed (theme-canvas-animation-status latches to "theme-changed").
Product list where a buy button morphs into a confirm bottom-sheet; tap an item to open then confirm 'Add to cart', then ASSERT the cart total (add-to-cart-status reads "cart:1").

Skia-rendered bottom tab bar (Home/Search/User); tapping the tab-bar rect center activates the centered Search tab. Tap the tab bar, then ASSERT the active tab (bottom-bar-skia-status reads "tab:search").
Cuberto-style balloon slider: a 300px horizontal track; drag the picker along the track, then ASSERT the drag took effect (cuberto-slider-status latches to "moved").
Skia metaball: two blurred circles stacked at center; drag one circle to stretch the gooey connection. Drag across the canvas, then ASSERT the drag took effect (metaball-status latches to "moved").

Two-column image grid; tap a card to navigate to a details screen with a shared-element transition, then back. ASSERT the Home screen re-focused after the round-trip (shared-transitions-status reads "home-visits:2").
Horizontal paged story carousel with snapToInterval; swipe LEFT to page through stories with a coverflow transform. ASSERT the carousel paged (story-list-status latches to "paged").

Top country tabs over a paged ScrollView; tap a tab to scroll the pager and slide the underline indicator. Tap Italy then Japan, then ASSERT the active tab (dynamic-tab-indicator-status reads "tab:japan").
Passive Skia animation: two noise-driven gradient circles drift and blur on an infinite loop with no user input. The outcome is simply that the canvas renders; ASSERT the canvas wrapper is visible.
Open the dropdown via the header trigger, then pick the Calendar option; ASSERTS the picked outcome (smooth-dropdown-status reads "picked:calendar").
Pan up on the canvas to open the sheet (snaps open) — ASSERTS the open outcome (skia-bottom-sheet-status reads "sheet:open") — then pan back down to close.
Tap the floating action button to morph it into the centered modal; ASSERTS the open outcome (floating-modal-status reads "shown").
Drag across the waveform to scrub the playhead, then back; ASSERTS the scrub outcome (audio-player-status reads "audio:scrubbed").
Swipe horizontally to page through the carousel; ASSERTS the page outcome (color-carousel-status reads "carousel:moved").
Drag across the card to drive the 3D rotation, then back; ASSERTS the tilt outcome (animated-3d-parallax-status reads "card:tilted").
Drag along the track to change the value, then back; ASSERTS the change outcome (fluid-slider-status reads "slider:moved").
Scroll the list, then tap the second section tab to jump; ASSERTS the jump outcome (animated-indicator-list-status reads "tab:Al Pacino").
Tap Shuffle twice to re-randomize the chart data; ASSERTS the shuffle outcome (radar-chart-status reads "shuffled:2").
Collapse the crop region, drag a corner, then tap Crop to open the cropped detail; ASSERTS the open outcome (image-cropper-status reads "cropped:shown").
Tap three grid cells to select them; ASSERTS the selection count outcome (selectable-grid-list-status reads "selected:3").
Tap the shuffle FAB twice to roll the count to new values; ASSERTS the roll outcome (animated-count-text-status reads "rolled:2").
Type new text to regenerate the QR code, then drag the deviation slider; ASSERTS the content outcome (qr-code-generator-status reads "qr:reactiive").
Tap the pill to open the popup, then pick 'Bottom Right' to spring the pill to that corner; ASSERTS the pick outcome (popup-handler-status reads "angle:bottom-right").
Tap different tabs to move the active indicator, ending on Message; ASSERTS the active-tab outcome (twitter-tab-bar-status reads "tab:message").
Swipe the carousel to page through, then toggle the Scale switch on; ASSERTS the toggle outcome (circular-carousel-status reads "scale:on").
A single centered 'Start' chip that splits into two icon buttons (Google left / Apple right) on tap, then commits on a second tap. Tests the split-open then select interaction.

Telegram-style app shell where an 80x80 Lottie switch button (bottom-right, above the tab bar) triggers a full-screen circular reveal that swaps light/dark theme. Tests tapping the switch to toggle the theme twice.

Full-screen Skia drawing canvas: the user draws a freehand path with a pan gesture, then on release the Fourier series animates epicycles redrawing that path. Tests drawing a stroke across the canvas.
Horizontal paging onboarding carousel of cat photos with an interpolated gradient background and per-page titles. Tests swiping LEFT through pages to advance the carousel.
A status-morphing button ('Check Transaction') that animates idle -> loading -> success/error with color and label transitions. Tests tapping to run the 2s mutation and observe the state change.

A gradient FAB opens a multi-page scrollable bottom sheet; the sheet pages advance via a 'Next Page' button and the sheet can be dragged. Tests opening the sheet then advancing a page, ending on the open sheet.
A full-width circular Skia color wheel with a draggable picker knob; dragging across the wheel updates the selected color. Tests dragging across the picker area.
A vertical FlatList of cards where items blur and scale based on their distance from the screen center as you scroll. Tests scrolling down then back up to drive the focus-blur effect.
An Airbnb-style price slider with an animated rolling-digit count and currency symbol above a horizontal track. Tests dragging the slider knob along its track to drive the price counter.
A segmented control (Light / Standard / Pro) that switches between datasets and animates a Skia line graph re-drawing between them. Tests tapping the segments to morph the graph.
A rotating + FAB opens a bottom action tray; the Continue button advances through its steps. Tap the FAB, then the Continue button twice, ending on the open tray.
A 'Toast!' button that stacks animated toast notifications; toasts can be swiped left to dismiss. Tests spawning toasts and swiping the active one away to the left.

A centered dark Skia panel hiding a numeric code; dragging a finger across it reveals the digits under a moving spotlight lens that scales nearby characters. Tests dragging across the panel to reveal the code.
A bottom-tab navigator (Home / Explore / Camera / Settings) with a blurred glass tab bar and an animated active indicator over full-screen images. Tests tapping tabs to move the indicator.

A draggable colored circle behind a Skia fractal-glass mask that refracts the circle into vertical glass strips; a FAB toggles light/dark theme. Tests dragging the circle across the glass and toggling the theme.
A vertical sortable list where a long-press-drag reorders items with animated reflow and border-radius feedback on the active row. Tests dragging the top item down past others to reorder.

Animated Skia Fibonacci shader disc driven by a horizontal AnimatedSlider (controls circle count N) plus a floating magic button that randomizes the pattern. Drags the slider and presses the magic button, then ASSERTS the shader was actually altered (fibonacci-shader-status reads "moved", bridged from the worklet-driven N value).
Family-style large animated number display fed by a custom on-screen numeric keypad. Taps 1,2,3,0 then backspace and ASSERTS the resulting value (family-number-input-status reads "123").

Two-sided balance slider (Coffee vs Milk); dragging the central handle redistributes the left/right percentages. Drags the handle right and left, then ASSERTS the slider moved (balance-slider-status reads "moved", bridged from onChange via scheduleOnRN).

Animated Skia Fibonacci shader disc controlled by a 2D draggable control panel (X = circle count, Y = magical multiplier). Drags across the pad, then ASSERTS the shader was altered (fibonacci-shader-grid-status reads "moved", bridged from the worklet n/magicalMul values).

Verification code entry: tapping the code boxes focuses an invisible number-pad TextInput; typing the correct code 11111 triggers the success animation. Focuses the field, enters 11111, then ASSERTS validation succeeded (verification-code-status latches "correct").

Email-style stacked list with floating restore/delete FABs that animate cards in/out. Presses delete twice then restore (net erased = 1), then ASSERTS the erased count (email-demo-status reads "erased:1", bridged from the erasedItems shared value).

Inverted vertical FlatList of large blurred numbers with a 3D depth/blur transition keyed to scroll position. Performs paged vertical swipes, then ASSERTS the list actually scrolled (scroll-transition-3d-status reads "moved", bridged from the worklet scrollY value).

Centered credit-card row with an eye toggle that staggers the first 12 digits between hidden and revealed. Taps the eye twice (reveal then hide), then ASSERTS the reveal actually fired (staggered-card-number-status latches "revealed").

A 'Show stacked tray' button presents a bottom sheet; pressing again pushes more sheets, which can be swiped down to dismiss. Presents stacked sheets then dismisses, and ASSERTS a sheet was actually shown (stacked-bottom-sheet-status latches "shown").

Notes app whose 'Add Note' (+) header button navigates to an AddNote screen via a GLSL DirectionalWarp transition. Taps + to trigger the transition, then ASSERTS the add-note screen actually mounted (gl-transitions-status reads "addnote").

Skia image editor whose ButterflyWaveScrawler GL transition progress is driven by a horizontal ruler/scrubber. Drags the scrubber left and right, then ASSERTS the transition progress moved (prequel-slider-status reads "moved", bridged from the worklet progressPercentage value).

A centered QR code that assembles/disassembles its modules with a staggered animation each time it is pressed. Taps to toggle assemble then disassemble, and ASSERTS it actually assembled (empty-qr-code-status latches "assembled").

Infinite circular horizontal carousel of theme cards with snap + a background gradient that animates to the active card's color. Performs paged swipes, then ASSERTS the active card advanced (infinite-carousel-status reads "moved", bridged from the worklet activeIndex value).

A 'Slide to Unlock' friction slider whose horizontal drag drives animated squares and a haptic unlock at full progress. Drags the thumb across the track, then ASSERTS the unlock fired (twodos-slide-status latches "unlocked" when progress reaches 1).

Animated count display driven by a vertical draggable ruler/wheel; a button toggles expanded line spacing. Swipes the wheel up and down then taps expand, and ASSERTS the picked value changed (wheel-picker-status reads "changed", bridged from the worklet count value).

A long vertical scroll list (50 cards) where items scale and fade into a stacked deck at the bottom as you scroll. Performs several up-swipes, then ASSERTS the list actually scrolled (stacked-list-status reads "moved", bridged from the worklet scrollOffset value).
Skia geometry button (concentric circles) centered on black screen; tapping morphs the stroke width with a spring + haptic.
Inverted FlatList; swiping up morphs a record button via scroll-driven progress interpolation and triggers the snap.
Skia dot-grid that renders a number; tapping the grid clears it then renders a new random number (700ms delayed).
Horizontal paged inverted ScrollView driving a stack of iMessage-style cards animated off scroll offset.
Skia Atlas button ('React Native' label) centered; tapping animates the square atlas + scales the button with a spring.
Skia Atlas sphere of squares scaled by distance from the touch point; a Pan gesture moves the focal point.
Grid of wrapped checkboxes (all labeled 'Italian'); each tap toggles a spring-animated checkmark + label color.
Movie-detail screen with a floating theme toggle (bottom-right); tapping runs a rescaler/blur light-dark appearance transition.
Onboarding screen with a 'Start your Journey' button that focuses a hidden card input, raising the Dot-style sheet/keyboard.
Horizontal paged FlatList of images with cover-flow rotation/scale driven by scroll offset.
Centered Skia paper that folds/unfolds via a spring; a full-screen pressable toggles the fold progress between 0 and 1.
Weekly Skia bar chart synced to a horizontal paged week list; paging changes the active week and animates the bars (with haptics).
3-step onboarding with animated dots and Back/Continue buttons; Continue advances the active step (label becomes 'Finish' on the last).
Circular draggable ruler slider that sets a count (with haptics), plus a start/stop button bottom-right.
Skia canvas pill of 4 tabs (Home/Changelog/Career/About) with an exclusion-blend selection indicator that slides between tabs; tabs are canvas-drawn so the whole pill carries one testID.
Scroll list of dark cards; tapping any card spawns a Clerk-style stacked toast that animates in and stacks.
Circular (donut) Skia slider; the picker handle is dragged around the ring to change the 1..12 value. Driven by swiping across the slider knob region.
A centered 'Continue' button that expands into an alert drawer with a Cancel button. Tap the trigger to open, then Cancel to dismiss.
A stacked list with a black '+' Add button; tapping it inserts a new item with a motion-blur entrance. Tap Add several times.
A centered Skia 'Delete' button with a gooey morph; first tap morphs to 'Confirm', second tap confirms. Tap the button twice.
A bottom tab navigator with a dynamic blur tab bar over a scrollable gradient screen. Tap different bottom-bar tabs to trigger the blur transition.
A playable Skia Snake board steered with directional fling gestures. Swipe in several directions on the board to change the snake's heading.
A mini player docked above a bottom tab bar; tapping it expands it into a full sheet, swiping down collapses it. Tap to expand then swipe down to collapse.
A Skia demo that animates a stroke tracing a bezier-curve outline; an 'Outline Mode' button toggles the outline overlay. Tap the toggle to switch modes.
A centered row of 4 tabs (Accounts/Home/Payments/Transfers) where the active tab expands its label. Tap different tabs to move the active indicator.
Neural-network MNIST demo: bottom half is a 28x28 Skia drawing canvas with an eraser button. Draw a digit with a couple of strokes to drive live prediction.
A '+' FAB that pushes a stack of modals, each with Confirm/Dismiss buttons; Confirm advances to the next stacked modal. Open the stack then confirm twice.
A passive demo driven entirely by device ROTATION/GRAVITY sensors (no touch handlers); a React logo reacts to tilt. On a simulator there is no input to exercise.
An OTP screen with an animated face that reacts to typing; tapping the code area focuses a hidden TextInput and entering 1111 drives the face animation. Focus and type the code.
A full-screen pressable that plays a staggered 'Everybody / can cook.' text reveal; tapping anywhere resets and replays. Tap the screen to retrigger the stagger.
A centered holographic ticket; tapping it flips it front/back (the holo tilt is device-motion driven). Tap the ticket to flip it.
A centered horizontal segmented control (Accounts/Deposits/Funds) with a fluid liquid-blur selector. Tap different segments to trigger the fluid blur transition.
Grid of gradient app tiles; long-press a tile to enter shake/edit mode (delete badges appear), then tap the badge to remove it.
A centered pill toggles its label between 'Use Max' and 'Using Max'; each tap re-composes the per-character spring layout animation.
Skia shader credit-card carousel with animated holographic reflections; the demo animates on its own with no required interaction.
Analog Skia clock driven by a vertical time-slot wheel; swipe the wheel up to scroll later times and watch the clock hands interpolate.
Tap Start Game to reveal the board and number pad, select the top-left cell, then tap the '5' key to fill it.
A centered circular plus button bursts a ring of particles and morphs the icon to a checkmark on press.
A draggable metallic puck spring-snaps to the nearest magnet point; swipe the puck to fling it and watch it snap to a new magnet.
iOS-style app grid; tap the first icon to play the expand-into-detail shared-element navigation transition.
Full-screen 'time machine' surface; swipe down to open the curved history stack revealing the scrollable cards behind it.
iOS-style app grid that plays a bouncy zoom-in intro; tap the screen to (re)trigger the bouncy spring animation that settles the icons into place.
A row of avatar chips split into online/offline sections; tap the surface to migrate an item between sections with a spring layout animation.
A floating control panel that can be dragged around the screen and spring-snaps to the nearest corner; swipe the panel to fling it to another corner.
GitHub-style contribution heatmap that plays a self-running wave animation across the squares with no required interaction.
A 3D stacked card carousel driven by an invisible horizontal scroller; swipe left to advance cards through the organic scale/fade/rotate stack.
Airbnb-style profile card; tap the card to play the 3D rotateY flip revealing the back face, then capture the flipped state.
Full-screen liquid-glass blur overlay over a photo with a vertical drag/parallax; the glass surface renders its refraction effect without any required interaction.

Full-screen Skia blurred card fan; an absolute-fill PressableOpacity over the canvas toggles the cards between collapsed and the spring-fanned blurred layout on each tap. Probe bridges the worklet 'progress' (>0.5) back to JS so the test asserts the cards actually fanned out.

Page-flip 'tear-off' calendar driven by a draggable slider (pan gesture); dragging the slider RIGHT flips through the days. Probe bridges the slider's page index (round(progress*31) > 0) back to JS so the test asserts the slider actually moved off the first page. NOTE: there is no tappable day grid, only the slider.

Full-screen Skia fibonacci sphere of 2000 circles that auto-pulses; a tap/drag on the canvas re-randomizes the spiral multiplier (magicalMul). Probe bridges the first change of magicalMul off its initial value (2.4) back to JS so the test asserts the perturbation actually registered.

Skia point-cloud 3D shape that morphs as you scroll a full-screen invisible horizontal pager; swiping LEFT advances to the next shape. Probe bridges the pager page index (round(scrollX/width)) back to JS so the test asserts the pager actually advanced to page 1.

3D torus of avatar sprites that morphs into a scannable QR code; the bottom floating toggle button springs between the torus and QR modes. Probe bridges the morph 'progress' (>0.5) back to JS so the test asserts the toggle actually switched into QR mode.

WebGPU GitHub-contributions terrain; tapping the canvas toggles flat<->raised 3D terrain, and a bottom-right Switch toggles real vs demo data. Probe mirrors the (ref-held) flat/raised + real/demo state into a '<flat|raised>-<real|demo>' token so the test asserts the data switch actually flipped to demo.

WebGPU cherry-blossom tree whose canopy encodes a QR code; an auto-focused TextInput drives the QR content live. Probe exposes the live qrContent string so the test asserts the typed text actually reached the QR encoder (default 'https://enzo.fyi' + typed 'hello').

WebGPU photo-mosaic gallery (10,000 photos) with double-tap-to-zoom, pinch and pan. PASSIVE: a prior run rendered BLANK (WebGPU did not paint) on this build, so interaction outcome cannot be reliably validated; we only assert the gallery canvas mounts. No source probe added.

react-native-chessboard that auto-replays a full game to a 'Game Review' end screen regardless of input; the New Game button and move history are hidden (SHOW_CHROME=false) and the auto-replay overrides any manual move. PASSIVE: no clean tappable control / deterministic input outcome; we only assert the board renders. No source probe added.
